plugins.name: video-bug-analyzer
plugins.description: Extract and reason over frames from a screen recording to diagnose UI/rendering bugs — stutter, hangs (--stall), whiteouts, content flicker (--content-revert), black screens, motion character — or read any clip's look, palette, and pacing. Requires ffmpeg (auto-installs where the sandbox allows).

plugins.name: repo-bootstrap
plugins.description: Onboard a repo to the portka-tools marketplace (committed .claude/settings.json + optional CI), and optionally install the Portka standard: a workflow CLAUDE.md, a git/gh permissions allowlist, an enforced SemVer sync with tests, and the corrected hosted git stop-hook.

plugins.name: app-website-evaluator
plugins.description: Audit an app or website into a standardized, coverage-honest scorecard (per-dimension 0-100 + letter grade, weighted overall, --json) from a live --url, a local --dir build, or pre-fetched --html — SEO, crawlability, AI-readiness, social, security, performance, growth.

plugins.name: tab-chord-formatter
plugins.description: Format a messy guitar tab or chord sheet into a clean, aligned layout, or render a consistent monospace PDF songbook — a deterministic cleanup script plus model judgment for chord-over-lyric alignment and section structure.
